mechanism_narrative: A lower federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows or forward returns are not significantly positive when FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 8.0 percent signals severe labor market deterioration and impending recession, triggering risk-off sentiment that produces negative S&P 500 forward returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8.0, or signal accuracy drops below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive forward returns with a t-statistic above 1.5 over 5-year samples.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a confirmed economic expansion regime reflects strengthening supply-side momentum, which translates into immediate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) when applied outside the mid-cycle expansion regime.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index reading above 230.0 indicates accelerating inflation that forces expectations of monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns within 20 days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of observations where CPIAUCSL exceeds 230.0, or the signal shows no statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in total nonfarm payrolls demonstrates robust labor market expansion, which supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to correlate with positive forward returns (Rank IC < 0.03) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent acceleration in real GDP and retail sales validates a synchronized demand expansion, reducing recession probability and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint condition produces negative forward returns in >50% of triggered cases, or interaction term loses significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive months of declining industrial production signal a supply-side contraction and weakening economic activity, triggering immediate risk aversion and negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >55% of instances following two months of INDPRO decline, or signal accuracy falls below chance.
